title: The Merchant Remembers
description: The traveling merchant recognizes you before you recognize him.

traded_fairly.title: A Fair Deal Repaid
traded_fairly.description: The merchant saved his finest goods for the traveler who treated him honestly. This time, the first offer truly is generous.

haggled_merchant.title: The Rematch
haggled_merchant.description: The merchant grins and produces a ledger. He has spent weeks preparing for the next time you tried to out-negotiate him.

robbed_merchant.title: The Merchant's Reckoning
robbed_merchant.description: The merchant is no longer alone. Armed guards step from behind his wagon as he demands payment for what you stole.

options.title: Trade Again
options.description: Put coin on the table and let both sides leave satisfied.

options.title: Demand a Favor
options.description: Use your shared history to secure a more profitable arrangement.

options.title: Avoid the Merchant
options.description: Some accounts are best left unsettled.
